BUSINESS GLOSSARY - Enterprise System
Last Updated: 2024-03-15
Status: Partial (pending review)

==========================================
CUSTOMER MANAGEMENT
==========================================

Customer
An individual or organization that... [definition incomplete]

Client
A person or company that purchases goods or services. (Note: may be used interchangeably with Customer in some contexts)

Account Holder
The person designated as the primary owner of an account. Similar to Customer bu... [TRUNCATED]

triplets.subject: Account Holder
triplets.object: the person designated as the primary owner of an account

triplets.subject: End User
triplets.object: the actual user of a product or service

triplets.subject: Order
triplets.object: a request to purchase products or services

triplets.subject: Transaction
triplets.object: similar to Order but more general

triplets.subject: Sales Order
triplets.object: an order with confirmed pricing and inventory allocation

triplets.subject: Quote
triplets.object: a preliminary order with estimated pricing

triplets.subject: SKU
triplets.object: a unique identifier for a product variant

triplets.subject: Payment
triplets.object: the transfer of money to settle an order

triplets.subject: Shipment
triplets.object: the process of delivering goods to a customer

triplets.subject: Delivery
triplets.object: the completion of a Shipment when goods reach the customer

triplets.subject: Fulfillment
triplets.object: the process of preparing and delivering orders

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer
entities_post_resolution.definition: An individual or organization that purchases goods or services from a business.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Customer
An individual or organization that... [definition incomplete] | Primary Key: customer_id (or is it CustomerID? check with DBA) | created_at | TIMESTAMP | ? | [missing documentation] | customer_id | INTEGER | FK | References customer (which table?) | Client
A person or company that purchases goods or services. (Note: may be used interchangeably with Customer in some contexts) | Possible duplicate of customer_id | customer_type | VARCHAR(30) | ? | [missing documentation]

entities_post_resolution.name: Financial Transaction
entities_post_resolution.definition: A financial transaction is any monetary exchange or transfer of value between parties.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Financial Transaction
Any monetary exchange. See Payment, Transaction. | Transaction
Similar to Order but more general. May refer to any exchange of value.

entities_post_resolution.name: Sales Order
entities_post_resolution.definition: A sales order is a documented request from a customer to purchase products or services, with confirmed pricing and inventory allocation, serving as a formal record for processing sales transactions.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Sales Order
An order with confirmed pricing and inventory allocation. Distinct from Quote. | Primary Key: order_id (or OrderID - verify) | order_date | DATE | ? | Date order was created | orderAmount | DECIMAL(10,2) | ? | Total order amount | shippingAmount | DECIMAL(10,2) | ? | Shipping cost | tax_amount | DECIMAL(10,2) | ? | Tax amount | created_at | TIMESTAMP | ? | [missing documentation] | updated_at | TIMESTAMP | ? | [missing documentation] | Order
A request to purchase products or services. Can be in various states.

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Status
entities_post_resolution.definition: OrderID is a unique identifier assigned to a specific order in a business system.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: order_status | VARCHAR(25) | ? | See valid values in... [missing reference] | OrderID | INTEGER | ? | [possible duplicate] | Primary Key: order_id (or OrderID - verify)

entities_post_resolution.name: Account Status
entities_post_resolution.definition: Payment refers to the transfer of money to settle an order or obligation.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
account_status | VARCHAR(20) | ? | [missing values documentation] | Payment
The transfer of money to settle an order. | [duplicate?] | payment_method | VARCHAR(30) | ? | [missing documentation] | payment_status | VARCHAR(20) | ? | [missing documentation]

entities_post_resolution.name: Total Amount
entities_post_resolution.definition: TaxAmount refers to the specific monetary value of tax applied in a financial context.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: total_amount | DECIMAL(12,2) | ? | [duplicate?] | TaxAmount | DECIMAL(10,2) | ? | [duplicate?] | tax_amount | DECIMAL(10,2) | ? | Tax amount

entities_post_resolution.name: Request To Purchase
entities_post_resolution.definition: Purchase refers to the act or process of acquiring goods or services, typically involving a request or transaction.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Order
A request to purchase products or services. Can be in various states. | Invoice
A document requesting payment. Related to Bill. | Purchase
The act of buying something. Related to Order and Transaction.

entities_post_resolution.name: Person Or Organization
entities_post_resolution.definition: An entity that can be an individual or a company/organization that purchases goods or services.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Client
A person or company that purchases goods or services. (Note: may be used interchangeably with Customer in some contexts) | Customer
An individual or organization that... [definition incomplete]

entities_post_resolution.name: Income From Sales
entities_post_resolution.definition: Income from sales is the revenue earned by a business from selling its products or services.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Revenue
Income from sales. The same as... [definition circular, see Sales] | Sales
Revenue from selling products. See Revenue.

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Fulfillment Process
entities_post_resolution.definition: The order fulfillment process includes all activities involved in preparing, packing, and delivering customer orders to ensure timely receipt.
synonyms: the process of delivering goods to a customer
the process of preparing and delivering orders
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Shipment
The process of delivering goods to a customer. | Fulfillment
The process of preparing and delivering orders. Encompasses Shipment and Delivery.

entities_post_resolution.name: Notes
entities_post_resolution.definition: Notes are textual annotations or comments used to record information or observations.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Notes | TEXT | ? | [duplicate?] | notes | TEXT | ? | [missing documentation]

entities_post_resolution.name: Email Address
entities_post_resolution.definition: An email or email address is a digital communication identifier used for sending electronic messages.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Email address | [possible duplicate] | Contact phone number

entities_post_resolution.name: Components First Name
entities_post_resolution.definition: These entities represent the individual components of a person's full name, specifically the first name and last name, used for identification purposes.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Customer's first name | [appears to be duplicate] | Customer's last name

tables_enriched.name: Customers
tables_enriched.description: This table stores information about customers, including their contact details, account status, type, and regional data for business analysis and customer management.

tables_enriched.name: Orders
tables_enriched.description: This table stores information about customer orders, including order details, status, amounts, payment information, and timestamps for record creation and updates.

tables_enriched.name: Order Items
tables_enriched.description: This table stores detailed information about individual items within customer orders, including product details, quantities, pricing, discounts, and total amounts for each line item.

tables_enriched.name: Products
tables_enriched.description: This table stores detailed information about products, including identifiers, names, categories, pricing, stock levels, activity status, and descriptions for inventory management and sales purposes.

tables_enriched.name: Payments
tables_enriched.description: This table records details of customer payments, including transaction identifiers, payment status, and timestamps for processing and creation.
